title: Health Screening: MedlinePlus
text:
ok for diseases before you have symptoms. Screening tests can find diseases early, when they're easier to treat. You can get some screenings in your doctor's office. Others need special equipment, so you may need to go to a different office or clinic.
Some conditions that doctors commonly screen for include:
Breast cancer and cervical cancer in women 
Colorectal cancer 
Diabetes 
High blood pressure 
High cholesterol 
Osteoporosis 
Overweight and obesity 
Prostate cancer in men 
Which tests you need depends on your age, your sex, your family history, and whether you have risk factors for certain diseases. After a screening test, ask when you will get the results and whom to talk to about them.
